title: Per-Agent Finding
description: One specialist agent's output for a single pipeline run. Mirrors the contract in docs/04_agent_contracts.md (findings / risks / recommendations / missing_data / simulation_requests / confidence / sources).

agent.description: Agent identifier, e.g. 'dcdc', 'filtering', 'parasitics'. Stable across runs.

area.description: Engineering area covered by this agent. Used as the report subsection title.

llm_generated.description: True when the finding text was produced by an LLM call. False for deterministic fallback output.

confidence.description: Agent's self-reported confidence in its analysis. Low when inputs are sparse.

findings.description: What the agent observed. Phrased as engineering hypotheses, not certainties.

risks.description: Specific risks the agent flagged. Distinct from findings: a risk is something that may happen, a finding is something observed.

recommendations.description: Concrete actions for the user. Each recommendation conforms to recommendation.schema.json.

missing_data.description: Inputs the agent would have liked but did not receive. E.g. 'no stack-up data', 'no layout'.

simulation_requests.description: Follow-up simulations the agent recommends running. Consumed by the orchestrator (M2.11).

sources.description: Rule_ID or Source_ID strings the agent relied on. Empty when no curated rules applied.

limitations.description: Caveats the agent attached to its own output. E.g. 'no datasheet supplied for U1'.

injections.description: M2.10 parasitic-injection plan. Empty for every agent except the parasitics agent. Each entry conforms to parasitic_injection.schema.json.
